anthropic.label: Anthropic
anthropic.note: Anthropic Claude — native tool calling, adaptive thinking, 1M context. Source: platform.claude.com/docs, May 2026.

openai.label: OpenAI (API Key)
openai.note: OpenAI — GPT-5.5 flagship. Source: developers.openai.com/docs/models, May 2026.

google.label: Google
google.note: Google Gemini via native SDK (GoogleProvider). Updated 2026-04-25.

copilot.label: GitHub Copilot
copilot.note: GitHub Copilot — real API data from api.githubcopilot.com/models, May 2026. Note: Copilot enforces lower context limits than direct APIs.

openrouter.label: OpenRouter
openrouter.note: OpenRouter — 358 models across 56 providers. Source: openrouter.ai/api/v1/models, May 2026.

opencode.label: OpenCode
opencode.note: OpenCode AI gateway (41 models). Source: opencode.ai/zen/v1/models, May 2026.

opencode-go.label: OpenCode Go
opencode-go.note: OpenCode Go - low cost subscription. Source: opencode.ai/zen/go/v1/models, May 2026.

cline.label: Cline API
cline.note: Cline API (OpenAI-compatible proxy). Source: api.cline.bot, May 2026.

groq.label: Groq
groq.note: Groq LPU inference — fastest tokens/sec. Source: console.groq.com/docs/models, May 2026.

xai.label: xAI
xai.note: xAI Grok — grok-4.3 is the only current model (old models retired May 15, 2026). Source: docs.x.ai, May 2026.

mistral.label: Mistral
mistral.note: Mistral AI — frontier coding (Medium 3.5), hybrid (Small 4). Source: docs.mistral.ai/models, May 2026.

kilocode.label: KiloCode
kilocode.note: KiloCode AI gateway - auto-routing. Source: api.kilo.ai/api/gateway/models, May 2026.

ollama.label: Ollama (Local)
ollama.note: Local Ollama server. Models vary by what you pull. Source: ollama.com, May 2026.

together.label: Together AI
together.note: Together AI — 200+ models, function calling. Source: together.ai/models, May 2026.

nvidia.label: NVIDIA NIM
nvidia.note: NVIDIA NIM (NVIDIA AI Foundation Models) - OpenAI-compatible. Updated 2026.
